title: coreopsis dentifolia
intro: Coreopsis dentifolia, also known as the threadleaf coreopsis, is a flowering plant species in the aster family. The plant's roots and leaves are used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coreopsis dentifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to help with digestive issues and fever reduction. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
